## đźŽŻ Agentic Issue Triage

This issue tracks the **MPG (Management Plane Generator) migration** for the **Azure HDInsight SDK** â€” migrating `Azure.ResourceManager.HDInsight` from Swagger/AutoRest to TypeSpec-based generation. It is a sub-issue of the parent migration tracking issue [#53864 â€” Azure Mgmt Generator migration](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/53864).

<details>
<summary>đź“‹ Issue Summary & Context</summary>

- **SDK package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.HDInsight` (located in `/sdk/hdinsight/`)
- **Parent tracking issue:** [#53864](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/53864) â€” per-RP migration tasks are sub-issues of this parent
- **Author:** Internal team member (@haiyuazhang)
- **Type:** Migration task (not a bug report or external feature request)
- **CODEOWNERS:** `@aim-for-better`, `@deshriva`, `@idear1203`

</details>

<details>
<summary>đź—‚ď¸Ź Migration Checklist (MPG Migration Steps)</summary>

Typical MPG migration checklist for an RP:

- [ ] Locate or create TypeSpec source in `azure-rest-api-specs` for `Microsoft.HDInsight`
- [ ] Set up `tsp-location.yaml` in `/sdk/hdinsight/Azure.ResourceManager.HDInsight/`
- [ ] Run `azsdk_package_generate_code` to generate from TypeSpec locally
- [ ] Resolve any breaking changes vs. current GA SDK (use `ApiCompat`)
- [ ] Apply mitigations for breaking changes (e.g. `CodeGenType`, `CodeGenSuppress`, `@`@clientName``, `@`@hierarchyBuilding``)
- [ ] Update `client.tsp` customizations as needed
- [ ] Run `Export-API.ps1` to regenerate public API listings
- [ ] Update changelog and package version
- [ ] Validate build and tests pass (`dotnet build`, `dotnet test`)
- [ ] Submit PR targeting `main`

</details>

<details>
<summary>đź”— Helpful Resources</summary>

- [MPG Migration Skill / Patterns](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/.github/skills/mpg-sdk-migration/SKILL.md)
- [Mitigate Breaking Changes Skill](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/.github/skills/mitigate-breaking-changes/SKILL.md)
- [Local SDK workflow instructions](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/eng/common/instructions/azsdk-tools/local-sdk-workflow.instructions.md)
- [azure-rest-api-specs HDInsight TypeSpec](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/tree/main/specification/hdinsight) â€” check for existing TypeSpec specs
- [Versioning guidelines](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/doc/dev/Versioning.md)
- [Parent tracking issue #53864](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/53864)

</details>

<details>
<summary>đź’ˇ Notes & Tips</summary>

- Check if HDInsight TypeSpec specs exist in `azure-rest-api-specs`; if not, they may need to be authored first.
- Pay attention to any enum or union types that may trigger the known `global::.TypeName` CodeGen bug â€” use `CodeGenSuppress` + custom method if encountered.
- Enable `enable-wire-path-attribute: true` in `tspconfig.yaml` if the existing package uses `WirePathAttribute`.
- Run `pre-commit-checks` skill before final commit to ensure API listings, snippets, and formatting are all up to date.

</details>
